evals.prompt: Build me a single self-contained HTML file with a music player card: frosted glass look over a colorful album-art style background, song title, artist, play/pause button, and a progress bar. I want it to look like Apple Music's glass widgets.
evals.expected_output: One HTML file; glass panel uses backdrop-filter blur with border + inset highlight over a rich backdrop; player controls present

evals.prompt: I want a liquid glass profile card like the Apple visionOS style: the card should refract and warp the background at its edges like real thick glass, not just a CSS blur. Draggable on desktop, photo or rich gradient backdrop, one self-contained HTML file. Put a name, role, and 3 stat tiles on the card.
evals.expected_output: WebGL shader lens refraction (not plain backdrop-filter), draggable card div tracked by uniforms, content tiles in translucent ink style

evals.prompt: make a login page for my side project, glassmorphism style. email + password inputs and a sign-in button sitting on a glass panel, over an animated colorful gradient background. self-contained html file please
evals.expected_output: Glass panel with backdrop-filter + edge border + inner highlight; inputs/buttons styled as inner translucent elements; animated gradient backdrop
